chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P. No. D- 652 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of CMA 2501/2022 3.For hearing of main case 17-01-2023 Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, Advocate along with petitioners. Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy P.G for the State along with I.O/SIP- Ghulam Hussain of P.S, Steel Town district Malir-Karachi. ***** I.O of the case is present and files copy of statement of petitioner No.1 recorded under Section 161 CrPC and states that as per her statement, petitioner No.1 has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 after obtaining Khulla from her first husband. He further states that he will file copy of such statement along with report before the concerned Magistrate for disposal of the FIR, lodged at his Police Station. Learned counsel for the petitioners on being satisfied with the statement of the I.O does not press this petition further, which stands disposed of accordingly along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
